items.title: 100-year-old Dow stock is surprising AI play
items.description: Caterpillar is a leading manufacturer of construction and mining equipment worldwide, renowned for its heavy machinery, industrial gas turbines, and off-highway diesel and natural gas engines. Always seen tied to construction cycles, Caterpillar is now breaking out of the mold with its Q3 2025 ...
